title: Agent Scratchpad — Watch a ReAct Agent Think, and Catch Where It Breaks
tagline: Replay an LLM agent's Thought → Action → Observation loop step by step and get an instant loop-health report — stuck loops, oscillation, out-of-toolset calls, ungrounded answers, error thrash — 100% in your browser, no API key.
description: In-browser ReAct trace player + loop-health analyzer: parses an agent transcript and flags the tool-use failure classes across the whole loop. No API key.
